channel.title: My projects on Chen's Blog
channel.description: Recent content in My projects on Chen's Blog

item.title: Asteroids Game Development Project
item.description: A project detailing the creation of an 'Asteroids' game with core logic, interactive features, and complex state management developed using JavaScript and jQuery.

item.title: Hadoop MapReduce Simulation
item.description: A simulation project of Hadoop's MapReduce framework, designed for efficient execution of MapReduce programs across computer clusters, focusing on concurrency and robust communication protocols for stability and fault tolerance.

item.title: InstaCraft: Instagram Clone
item.description: An Instagram clone called InstaCraft with features like React.js for interactive elements, Flask for backend development, AJAX for asynchronous data loading, and NGINX integration for scalability and performance enhancement.

item.title: Scalable Search Engine Development
item.description: Development of a scalable search engine optimized for dynamic web page content and searches, implementing service-oriented architecture and employing technologies like JSON and HTML for server responses.
